channel.title: ProbBrain - AI News Terminal
channel.description: AI lab announcements, arXiv papers, GitHub and HuggingFace trending, AI Hacker News, and independent writers - aggregated, deduped, and posted to @ProbBrain on Telegram.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] Hmbown/DeepSeek-TUI — Coding agent for DeepSeek models that runs in your terminal
item.description: DeepSeek-TUI is a terminal-based coding agent for DeepSeek models.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] AIDC-AI/Pixelle-Video — 🚀 AI 全自动短视频引擎 | AI Fully Automated Short Video Engine
item.description: Pixelle-Video is an AI system for automated short video generation.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] sponsors/czlonkowski — A MCP for Claude Desktop / Claude Code / Windsurf / Cursor to build n8n workflows for you
item.description: MCP tool enables Claude Desktop, Claude Code, Windsurf, and Cursor to build n8n workflows.

item.title: [Hacker News] Specsmaxxing – On overcoming AI psychosis, and why I write specs in YAML
item.description: Specsmaxxing – On overcoming AI psychosis, and why I write specs in YAML

item.title: [Hacker News] Kimi K2.6 just beat Claude, GPT-5.5, and Gemini in a coding challenge
item.description: Kimi K2.6 just beat Claude, GPT-5.5, and Gemini in a coding challenge

item.title: [Hacker News] Maryland Is First to Ban A.I.-Driven Price Increases in Grocery Stores
item.description: Maryland Is First to Ban A.I.-Driven Price Increases in Grocery Stores

item.description: The agent harness belongs outside the sandbox

item.description: VS Code inserting 'Co-Authored-by Copilot' into commits regardless of usage

item.description: LLMs consistently pick resumes they generate over ones by humans or other models

item.title: [GitHub Trending] TauricResearch/TradingAgents — TradingAgents: Multi-Agents LLM Financial Trading Framework
item.description: TradingAgents is a multi-agent LLM framework for financial trading applications.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] ruvnet/ruflo — 🌊 The leading agent orchestration platform for Claude. Deploy intelligent multi-agent swarms, coordinate autonomous workflows, and build conversational AI systems. Features enterprise-grade architecture, distributed swarm intelligence, RAG integration, and native Claude Code / Codex Integration
item.description: Ruflo provides agent orchestration for Claude, featuring multi-agent swarms, autonomous workflows, conversational AI, and RAG integration.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] browserbase/skills — Claude Agent SDK with a web browsing tool
item.description: Browserbase/skills is a Claude Agent SDK with web browsing capabilities.

item.description: jcode, a coding agent harness, is trending on GitHub.
